title: Exclusive and continuing jurisdiction
doc_html:
§4251.205. Exclusive and continuing jurisdiction

            Except as otherwise provided in R.S. 13:4251.204, a court that has appointed a guardian or issued a protective order consistent with this Chapter has exclusive and continuing jurisdiction over the proceeding until it is terminated by the court or the appointment or order expires by its own terms.

            Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
doc_text:
§4251.205.  Exclusive and continuing jurisdiction
Except as otherwise provided in R.S. 13:4251.204, a court that has appointed a
guardian or issued a protective order consistent with this Chapter has exclusive and
continuing jurisdiction over the proceeding until it is terminated by the court or the
appointment or order expires by its own terms.
Acts 2016, No. 333, §1.
